description: Scroll the page with the mouse wheel. Returns: 'scrolled ({delta_x}, {delta_y}) in {steps} steps'. The delta values are divided equally across 'steps' — e.g. delta_y=500, steps=5 rolls the wheel 5 times, each step applying 100px of scroll. Example: {"delta_y": 500}
name: web_scroll_wheel

delta_x.description: Horizontal scroll amount (total pixels, divided across steps)

delta_y.description: Vertical scroll amount (total pixels, divided across steps. E.g. delta_y=500, steps=5 → 5 scrolls of 100px each)

steps.description: Number of discrete scroll events. Total delta is divided equally across steps (default 1). More steps = smoother scrolling

browser_id.description: Browser instance ID (returned by web_start). If not specified and only one instance exists, that instance is used.
